microwave_time.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND no sauces THEN 2 min BECAUSE it balances warmth and efficiency. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND no sauces THEN 1 min BECAUSE cooler food is less distracting. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND no sauces THEN 3 min BECAUSE hotter food is preferred for quick meals. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND no sauces THEN 1 min BECAUSE cooler food requires less effort to handle. IF eating alone AND energetic AND desserts THEN no microwave BECAUSE desserts are typically served cold.

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any food THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE it allows clear view of surroundings. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any food THEN minimize left occlusion BECAUSE social interaction is prioritized. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any food THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE entertainment is prioritized. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any food THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE it reduces cognitive load. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any food THEN do not consider occlusion BECAUSE engagement with others is prioritized.

robot_speed.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any food THEN medium BECAUSE it balances speed and safety. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any food THEN slow BECAUSE it allows for conversation. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any food THEN fast BECAUSE efficiency is prioritized. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any food THEN medium BECAUSE it maintains a manageable pace. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any food THEN medium BECAUSE it supports social interaction without rushing.

skewering_axis.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND meats THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE it creates manageable bite sizes. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND meats THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE it increases bite acquisition success. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND meats THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE it ensures quicker consumption. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND meats THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE it requires less effort to chew. IF eating with others AND energetic AND fruits THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE it facilitates sharing.

web_interface_confirmation.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any food THEN no BECAUSE it simplifies the process. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any food THEN yes BECAUSE it allows for social interaction. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any food THEN no BECAUSE it reduces interruptions. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any food THEN no BECAUSE it minimizes cognitive load. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any food THEN yes BECAUSE it supports engagement and control.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any food THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE it requires less effort. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any food THEN outside mouth transfer BECAUSE it is more socially acceptable. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any food THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE it is faster. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any food THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE it reduces physical effort. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any food THEN outside mouth transfer BECAUSE it encourages interaction.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any food THEN near BECAUSE it is more efficient. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any food THEN medium BECAUSE it allows for more social interaction space. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any food THEN near BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any food THEN near BECAUSE it reduces the effort needed to reach the food. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any food THEN medium BECAUSE it facilitates engagement.

robot_ready_cue.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any food THEN speech BECAUSE it is clear and direct. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any food THEN speech + LED BECAUSE it is less intrusive. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any food THEN LED BECAUSE it is less disruptive. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any food THEN speech BECAUSE it is more noticeable. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any food THEN speech + LED BECAUSE it supports interaction without being too distracting.

bite_initiation_feeding.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any food THEN open mouth BECAUSE it is effortless. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any food THEN button BECAUSE it avoids confusion with talking. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any food THEN autocontinue BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any food THEN open mouth BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any food THEN button BECAUSE it maintains control and engagement.

bite_initiation_drinking.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any drink THEN open mouth BECAUSE it is straightforward. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any drink THEN button BECAUSE it avoids confusion. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any drink THEN autocontinue BECAUSE it is efficient. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any drink THEN open mouth BECAUSE it minimizes effort. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any drink THEN button BECAUSE it supports interaction.

bite_initiation_wiping.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any food THEN open mouth BECAUSE it is simple. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any food THEN button BECAUSE it avoids confusion. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any food THEN autocontinue BECAUSE it is fast. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any food THEN open mouth BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any food THEN button BECAUSE it maintains control.

robot_bite_available_cue.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any food THEN speech BECAUSE it is clear. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any food THEN speech + LED BECAUSE it is less disruptive. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any food THEN LED BECAUSE it is subtle. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any food THEN speech BECAUSE it is more noticeable. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any food THEN speech + LED BECAUSE it supports interaction.

bite_completion_feeding.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any food THEN perception BECAUSE it is automatic. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any food THEN button BECAUSE it allows for control. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any food THEN autocontinue BECAUSE it is efficient. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any food THEN perception BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any food THEN button BECAUSE it supports engagement.

bite_completion_drinking.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any drink THEN perception BECAUSE it is seamless. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any drink THEN button BECAUSE it allows for control. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any drink THEN autocontinue BECAUSE it is quick. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any drink THEN perception BECAUSE it minimizes effort. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any drink THEN button BECAUSE it supports interaction.

bite_completion_wiping.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any food THEN perception BECAUSE it is automatic. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any food THEN button BECAUSE it allows for control. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any food THEN autocontinue BECAUSE it is efficient. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any food THEN perception BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any food THEN button BECAUSE it supports engagement.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any food THEN yes BECAUSE it reduces obstruction. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any food THEN yes BECAUSE it allows for social interaction. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any food THEN no BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any food THEN yes BECAUSE it minimizes visual distraction. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any food THEN yes BECAUSE it facilitates engagement.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND foods with sauces THEN do not dip BECAUSE it reduces mess. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND foods with sauces THEN dip food in sauce BECAUSE it enhances flavor. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND foods with sauces THEN do not dip BECAUSE it is faster. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND foods with sauces THEN do not dip BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating with others AND energetic AND foods with sauces THEN dip food in sauce BECAUSE it supports social dining.

amount_to_dip.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND foods with sauces THEN not applicable BECAUSE dipping is not preferred. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND foods with sauces THEN more BECAUSE it enhances flavor. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND foods with sauces THEN less BECAUSE it is quicker. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND foods with sauces THEN not applicable BECAUSE dipping is not preferred. IF eating with others AND energetic AND foods with sauces THEN more BECAUSE it supports social interaction.

wait_before_autocontinue_seconds.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND neutral AND any food THEN 100 BECAUSE it balances speed and user control. IF eating with others AND relaxed AND any food THEN 1000 BECAUSE it allows for conversation. IF watching TV AND in a hurry AND any food THEN 10 BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF working on a laptop AND fatigued AND any food THEN 100 BECAUSE it maintains a manageable pace. IF eating with others AND energetic AND any food THEN 100 BECAUSE it supports interaction without rushing.
